ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system running on the server */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU specifications of the server */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Memory specifications of the server */,
  "disk_space" TEXT /* Disk space available on the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the server (e.g., data center, cloud) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment of the server (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server hosting the database */,
  "database_type" TEXT /* Type of database (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the database in GB */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the database */,
  "collation" TEXT /* Collation of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., memory usage, query execution time) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "averaging_window" INTEGER /* Averaging window for the metric (e.g., 1 minute, 1 hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the threshold (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the threshold (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Notification channel for threshold breaches (e.g., email, slack) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the threshold */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "delivery_channel" TEXT /* Delivery channel for the notification (e.g., email, slack) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the query */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was executed */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., select, insert, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indexing" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "columns" TEXT /* Columns included in the index */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., primary key, unique, normal) */,
  "cardinality" REAL /* Cardinality of the index (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexing_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data distribution */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "row_count" INTEGER /* Number of rows in the table */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data in the table */,
  "data_skew" REAL /* Data skew of the table (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_distribution_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, dev) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, operations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the integration is enabled */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., monitoring, notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the metric */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to take */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., optimization, troubleshooting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., query, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backup_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup job */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database */,
  "backup_type" TEXT /* Type of backup (e.g., full, incremental) */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for the backup job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the backup job (e.g., running, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backup_jobs_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database instance */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database */,
  "instance_type" TEXT /* Type of database instance (e.g., primary, replica) */,
  "instance_status" TEXT /* Status of the database instance (e.g., running, stopped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_instances_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)
